mismatch_policy: Retrieval-only adapted FlowFence-Lite slice on top of the simplified ReAct-StrategyQA AgentPoison wrapper; not a claim of full FlowFence-Lite or full AgentPoison reproduction.
assumption_notes: Scope is locked to retrieval-memory interception only; no workspace, tool-arg, or topology expansion is included in this tuned method artifact.
Lease behavior is represented as logged lease signals only and is not a stateful privilege system in this MVP.
This tuned variant changes only the retrieval policy behavior, not the manifest, provider, or metric contract.
evaluation_risks: Retrieval-only instrumentation can understate leakage through unmodeled channels.
Rule-based detection can overfit the known poison format.
A rewrite-first policy can preserve utility only if sanitization retains enough useful facts.
This adapted slice is valid for policy tuning on the locked baseline, not broad framework-level claims.
execution_nondeterminism_note: The wrapper uses temperature 0, but provider/runtime nondeterminism can still change outputs across reruns.
